/src/tsconfig.json(2,30): error TS5024: Compiler option 'reference.path' requires a value of type string.

    {
        "references": [{ "path": true }, { "path": "./other", "circular": "yes" }]
                                 ~~~~
!!! error TS5024: Compiler option 'reference.path' requires a value of type string.
